hero.headline: The smartest way to
hero.subheadline: Ronda Privé enables attendees to purchase from their phone and organizers to sell more, with full real-time control.

howItWorks.label: How it works
howItWorks.title: Three steps to
howItWorks.subtitle: No complications. No extensive training. Just results.

steps.title: Scan or access
steps.description: Attendees access from their phone with a simple QR code or direct link. No apps, no friction.

steps.title: Easy purchase
steps.description: They choose drinks, VIP tables, or menu items. Integrated digital payment in seconds.

steps.title: Efficient delivery
steps.description: The order goes directly to staff. You control everything in real-time from the dashboard.

benefits.label: Benefits
benefits.title: Everything you need to
benefits.subtitle: Designed by and for event organizers who seek results.

items.title: More sales per attendee
items.description: Increase average ticket by up to 40% with frictionless purchases.

items.title: Fewer lines and friction
items.description: Eliminate waiting queues. More time enjoying, more consumption.

items.title: Inventory control
items.description: View stock in real-time. Make decisions with precise data.

items.title: Less staff burden
items.description: Optimize operations. Your team focuses on the experience.

items.title: Integrated digital payments
items.description: Multiple payment methods. Zero cash, zero problems.

items.title: Premium experience
items.description: Your attendees enjoy a first-class event from their phone.

platform.label: Platform
platform.title: Technology that
